gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/122)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/122)
text: تَغَدَّى عِنْدِي أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) فَجِي‏ءَ بِقَصْعَةٍ وَ تَحْتَهَا خُبْزٌ فَقَالَ أَكْرِمُوا الْخُبْزَ أَنْ لَا يَكُونَ تَحْتَهَا وَ قَالَ لِي مُرِ الْغُلَامَ أَنْ يُخْرِجَ الرَّغِيفَ مِنْ تَحْتِ الْقَصْعَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, and someone else, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Fazl Al Nowfaly, from Al Fazl Bin Yunus who said,

‘Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> had lunch with me, so I came with a bowl and beneath it was bread. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Honour the bread, that it should not happen to be under it’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Instruct the slave that he takes out the bread from beneath the bowl’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ali ibn Muhammad Bandar and others have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Fadl al- Nawfaliy from al-Fadl ibn Yunus who has said the following: “I once had lunch with abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and the dish was brought with bread underneath the dish. He (the Imam) said, ‘You must revere bread and do not allow it to be placed under the dish.’ He (the Imam) then said to me to command the slave to take the bread from underneath the dish.”’
